name: Dawson Jovi Pangestu
title: Digital Transformation Officer | Technical Project Manager

paragraphs: I'm a Digital Transformation Officer based in Jakarta, Indonesia, with 9+ years of experience delivering digital projects in manufacturing — turning manual, spreadsheet-driven processes into scalable systems across:
I'm also a Certified ScrumMaster I (CSM I), and currently lead digital transformation initiatives at Mattel while building a startup of my own.
